notableEvents.label: Jose Fernandez pinch-hit
notableEvents.detail: Jose Fernandez reaches on a fielding error by shortstop Corey Seager.

notableEvents.label: Jose Fernandez reached on error
notableEvents.detail: Jose Fernandez reaches on a fielding error by shortstop Corey Seager.

notableEvents.label: Jose Fernandez pinch-hit
notableEvents.detail: Jose Fernandez lines out to center fielder Evan Carter.

notableEvents.label: Stolen base
notableEvents.detail: Cal Quantrill challenged (pitch result), call on the field was overturned: Gabriel Moreno steals (1) 2nd base.

notableEvents.label: Walk-off loss
notableEvents.detail: Danny Jansen singles on a ground ball to left fielder Ryan Waldschmidt. Alejandro Osuna scores. Jake Burger to 2nd.

notableEvents.detail: Alejandro Osuna hit by pitch. Evan Carter to 2nd.
